user_term_to_sap_field_translation.sap_mapping: Field Unit / Maputo. At UNESCO, Maputo office operates under BUKRS='UNES' (HQ company code) — there is NO separate Mozambique company code in T001. Field-office identity is carried via PA0001.BTRTL, USR05.Y_USERFO, and BUSINESS AREA assignments per YTFI_BA_SUBST / YBASUBST.
user_term_to_sap_field_translation.note: No Mozambique BUKRS exists. All MAP office postings use UNES BUKRS.
